name: genpark-konvy-beauty-deals-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - An AI agent skill for discovering authentic beauty deals, searching cosmetics products, browsing brands, and finding promotions on Konvy.com — Thailand's leading beauty e-commerce platform.
author: genpark

query.description: Product name, ingredient, or brand to search for.

max_price_thb.description: Maximum price in Thai Baht to filter results.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

products.description: List of matched beauty products with name, price, discount, brand, and URL.

total_found.description: Total number of matching products found.

best_deal.description: The product with the highest discount percentage.
